title: iOS Developer
description: WHO ARE WE? At nooro, we're revolutionizing pain management for seniors. Our platform is transforming how older adults engage with pain management at home. We're on a mission to make wellness more accessible and effective through technology. Check our website here: https://nooro-us.com/ We're a fast-moving startup that works on quick iteration and bold decisions. Our team is lean, agile, and empowered to make meaningful impacts daily.
